parameters.subject: ={{ "Booking #" + $json.booking_id + " terkonfirmasi" }}
parameters.message:
={{ ['Halo ' + ($json.user_name || 'Member CourtFlow'), '', 'Booking #' + $json.booking_id + ' terkonfirmasi.', '', 'Lapangan: ' + ($json.court_name || '-'), 'Tanggal: ' + ($json.date || '-'), 'Jam: ' + ($json.start_time || '-') + '–' + ($json.end_time || '-') + ' WIB', 'Total: Rp' + Number($json.total_price || 0).toLocaleString('id-ID'), '', 'Terima kasih,', 'CourtFlow'].join('
') }}

') }}
